chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 966 of 2022 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objection at Flag-A 2. For hearing of main case 15.05.2024 Mr. Riaz Ali Shaikh, Advocate holding brief for Mr. Abdul Naeem Pirzada, Advocate for petitioner. Mr. Khuda Bux Chohan, Advocate for respondents-Sukkur Municipal Corporation. Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Naich, Assistant Advocate General Sindh..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Petitioner has filed this petition for release of an amount of Rs.3,09,617/- to her as pensionary benefits of her late father Muhammad Saleh, who was a Driver in Health Branch of Sukkur Municipal Corporation and had retired from service on 14.10.1981. Learned Counsel for respondents-Sukkur Municipal Corporation has filed a statement along with certain documents showing that gratuity of Rs.13,608/- and regular monthly pension were already paid to her father up to his death on 06.10.2000, and no dues were outstanding against Sukkur Municipal Corporation. After his death, family pension was transferred to his widow Mst. Hajra Begum vide letter dated 24.01.2001, and she got regular pension up to her death on 03.11.2010. Thereafter, family pension was transferred to the petitioner, her daughter, and she has been receiving monthly pension since then without any gap. In view of such factual position, we are of the view that this petition is misconceived and meritless, and is accordingly therefore dismissed. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
